scope_statement: Discovery is scoped to authorized lab environments. LIMS BOX turns approved local signals into an asset registry and integration checklist.
authorization_environment: owner-controlled lab bench / pilot lab only

discovered_assets.lims_workflow_relevance: Bench-side dashboard surface for run sheets and instrument status. Eligible to receive read-only LIMS BOT views.
discovered_assets.notes: Owner-confirmed display client. No control plane access. Read-only role only.

discovered_assets.asset_type_guess: NFC reader for owner-supplied lab asset tags
discovered_assets.lims_workflow_relevance: Reads NTAG215 tags applied by the lab to instruments and consumables. Triggers Field Scout asset look-up.
discovered_assets.notes: Used only against blank tags written by the lab. No badge, key, or access-control reads.

discovered_assets.lims_workflow_relevance: Local sample-intake terminal at remote bench. Sync candidate for end-of-shift batch upload.
discovered_assets.notes: Pre-imaged node. Pairing requires operator approval inside LIMS BOX.

discovered_assets.lims_workflow_relevance: Print sample / asset / chain-of-custody labels. Eligible for Field Scout label print workflow.
discovered_assets.notes: On lab subnet. Print queue scoped to LIMS BOX user.

discovered_assets.lims_workflow_relevance: Likely host for vendor instrument software. Candidate for file-drop or shared-folder integration pattern.
discovered_assets.notes: Owner-confirmed bench PC. Integration path is a watched folder, not direct control.

discovered_assets.lims_workflow_relevance: Flagged for run sheet generation, sample-to-flowcell mapping, and result file ingestion via vendor export folder.
discovered_assets.notes: Mock instrument for demo. Real integrations require vendor-supplied interface spec.

discovered_assets.lims_workflow_relevance: Captures weight readings into sample prep step. Eligible for direct-capture workflow with operator confirm.
discovered_assets.notes: Mock for demo. Real balances integrate via RS-232 or USB serial.

discovered_assets.lims_workflow_relevance: Eligible for protocol selection, run-start logging, and post-run result attachment.
discovered_assets.notes: Mock for demo. Real integration depends on vendor export format.

discovered_assets.lims_workflow_relevance: Drives sample log-in, asset lookup, and chain-of-custody scan steps.
discovered_assets.notes: Standard HID scanner. No driver install required for demo.

discovered_assets.lims_workflow_relevance: Eligible for compliance report and audit packet print routing.
discovered_assets.notes: Print queue gated by LIMS BOX user role.
